parityMeta.describes: CC-2 coachActionEngine — FUNCTION-LEVEL parity for buildCoachActionSourceFingerprint (src/engines/coachActionEngine.ts:138). Each case echoes the action (the 7-field Pick) + options (CoachActionFingerprintContext) and the REAL fingerprint string. Cases pin: the `title || '' / description || '' / reason || ''` empty-string projection (ts:144-148); the sourceTemplateId / suggestedChangeType context; the suggestedChange{muscleId,setsDelta} context; and the muscleId/exerciseId context. The Swift CoachActionEngine.buildCoachActionSourceFingerprint re-runs the SAME wrapper (delegating to the PA-S5 CoachActionIdentityEngine.buildCoachActionFingerprint) over the echoed action+options and EXACT-asserts the fingerprint string == golden `result`, case-by-case.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: No clock — buildCoachActionSourceFingerprint is PURE (FNV-1a string transform; no new Date / Date.now / Math.random). Synthetic ids + Chinese visible text. No email/token/userId/deviceLabel.

cases.label: minimal — no title/description/reason (→ '' fallbacks), empty options

action.title: 生成训练量调整预览
